outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel Strikes Iran's Nuclear Facilities as War Enters Day 28 — IDF Hits Arak Reactor, Ardakan Yellowcake Plant for First Time
outlets.summary: CNN focuses on Iranian civilian casualties in Kermanshah (20+ killed), the nuclear escalation risk from Ardakan yellowcake strike, and diplomatic contradictions between Trump's pause and Israel's continued nuclear strikes.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Rubio Tries to Sell Iran War to Skeptical G7 Diplomats After Trump Insults Allies
outlets.summary: WaPo covers the deepening US-European rift, with Germany calling the war a catastrophe and France upset at not being consulted before strikes.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Russia Is Helping Iran Target and Kill Americans, EU's Top Diplomat Says at G7
outlets.summary: CNN highlights the Kallas bombshell at G7 — Russia providing intelligence to Iran — and the US-EU divergence on whether to believe Russia's denial.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Stocks Fall, Oil Prices Rise Amid Doubts Over US-Iran Talks
outlets.summary: NBC reports S&P 500 fell 1.74% — worst day of the war — as Iran rejected the 15-point peace plan; Brent rose to .99, WTI .48.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Rubio: War Objectives 'Ahead of Schedule,' Achievable Without Ground Troops — US Only Verified 1/3 of Iran's Missiles Destroyed
outlets.summary: Fox News leads with Rubio's G7 comments that war is ahead of schedule and targets achievable without ground troops, while separately noting leaked US intel suggesting only 1/3 of Iran's missiles confirmed destroyed.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump Reveals Conditions for Iran's Surrender; Extends Energy Strike Pause to April 6
outlets.summary: Breitbart frames the energy pause as Trump holding leverage over Iran while outlining unconditional surrender terms.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth: 'Iran Has No Navy, No Navy Leader — Pure American Success'
outlets.summary: Conservative media amplifies Hegseth's triumphalist framing after IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri's killing, with 92% of Iran's large navy eliminated.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Pentagon Planning to Deploy 10,000 More Troops — 82nd Airborne Headed to Middle East
outlets.summary: Right-leaning outlets frame the 10,000-troop deployment planning as showing US resolve to finish the war on its terms.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran Turns Back Chinese Ships at Hormuz as Nuclear Strikes Trigger IRGC 'Beyond Eye for Eye' Warning — Brent $112.57
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera emphasizes Iranian FM's explicit denial of negotiations, IRGC evacuation warnings for Gulf industrial workers, and the blockade's direct impact on global shipping with Chinese ships being turned back.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Rubio Spars With G-7 Diplomats Over Wars in Iran and Ukraine
outlets.summary: Bloomberg details the diplomatic fractures at Vaux-de-Cernay, with 35 nations holding separate talks on Hormuz reopening without the US.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Russia Is Giving Iran Intel to Kill Americans, Kallas Tells G7 — UK Confirms
outlets.summary: BBC and international outlets lead with the Russia-Iran intelligence sharing revelation; UK Defense Secretary confirms with British intelligence data.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Brent Crude Hits  as Iran Rejects Peace Plan; 10,000 More US Troops Eyed for Middle East
outlets.summary: Reuters covers markets and military escalation simultaneously — oil at .99 on broken ceasefire hopes, Pentagon actively planning major ground troop deployment.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF Strikes Arak Reactor, Ardakan Yellowcake Facility for First Time — IAEA: No Radiation Risk; Vance Confronts Netanyahu Over Regime Change
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers the nuclear escalation as strategically significant, while also breaking the Vance-Netanyahu tension story on regime-change expectations. IDF confirms 92% of Iran's large navy ships eliminated.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Israel Strikes Tehran Weapon Manufacturing Sites, Yazd Naval Facility; Iran Fires Wave 83 at Four Gulf Bases
outlets.summary: JP covers Israel's major overnight strikes as well as Iran's Wave 83 response targeting US assets across the Gulf.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu Ordered IDF to Maximize Iran Strikes in 48 Hours Before Possible Ceasefire
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Netanyahu and security chiefs do not trust Trump's 15-point plan to remove the nuclear/missile threat; IDF ordered to accelerate arms factory targeting.

outlets.name: Ynet
outlets.headline: Iran Wave 83: Four US Gulf Bases Struck Simultaneously; Yazd Naval Arms Site Destroyed by IAF
outlets.summary: Israeli media covering the expanded geographic scope of IRGC attacks and IDF's counterstrike degrading Iran's naval production capacity.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: IRGC Launches Wave 83 — Iran FM: No Negotiations, Will Exact Heavy Price for Israeli Nuclear Crimes; Industrial Workers Must Evacuate Now
outlets.summary: Press TV leads with IRGC Commander Moosavi's evacuation warning for US/Israeli-linked industrial sites and Araghchi's total denial of any negotiations, framing Israeli nuclear strikes as crimes against Iranian civilians.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: 300 Basij Commanders Killed in US-Israeli Strikes; Mojtaba Khamenei Health Questions Persist
outlets.summary: Iran International reports on internal regime military losses and uncertainty surrounding new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's health and whereabouts.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Araghchi: US Admitting Defeat by Seeking Negotiations — Iran's Conditions Non-Negotiable
outlets.summary: State media amplifies Araghchi's framing that US seeking talks proves American defeat, and Iran's 5 counter-conditions are firm.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Islamic Republic Forces Continue Operation True Promise 4 — Striking Enemy Infrastructure
outlets.summary: State news agency covers IRGC Wave 83 as defensive resistance against US-Israeli aggression; claims strikes damaged Patriot systems at US bases.
